task_params.title: Medication Safety Pitch - Barcode Scanning Compliance
pitch_points: problem: missed barcode scans during med pass still create near-miss risk
proposal: brief shift huddle reminder plus scanner readiness check
pilot on one med-surg unit for two weeks
track compliance rate and near-miss reports before and after
include bilingual patient ID confirmation as a reinforcement step
